creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
Updated patch for foswiki 1.1.5:
diff -urN foswiki/Makefile foswiki-new/Makefile
--- foswiki/Makefile	2012-01-02 03:34:59.000000000 -0800
+++ foswiki-new/Makefile	2012-03-24 22:44:47.000000000 -0700
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=	foswiki
-PORTVERSION=	1.1.3
+PORTVERSION=	1.1.5
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 DISTNAME=	Foswiki-${PORTVERSION}
diff -urN foswiki/distinfo foswiki-new/distinfo
--- foswiki/distinfo	2011-04-19 03:08:02.000000000 -0700
+++ foswiki-new/distinfo	2012-03-24 23:10:02.000000000 -0700
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (foswiki/Foswiki-1.1.3.tgz) =
76d81d10765fefb0e17872482b778fab446d6e357a62ba87aba6eb36d4398b7d
-SIZE (foswiki/Foswiki-1.1.3.tgz) = 13263991
+SHA256 (foswiki/Foswiki-1.1.5.tgz) =
7868d32bd3852c7772f88c3ccf6289639d4026adeeef2353c2bbe5e774d1e237
+SIZE (foswiki/Foswiki-1.1.5.tgz) = 15306439
